content: Python OIDC resource-server validation: use PyJWT with PyJWKClient (caches JWKS, resolves kid) and verify signature, iss, aud, exp; fetch jwks_uri from /.well-known/openid-configuration. Critical gotcha for node oidc-provider issuers: access tokens are OPAQUE by default; JWT access tokens require the Resource Indicators (RFC 8707) feature with accessTokenFormat 'jwt' and a resource/audience configured for the voice API. Alternatives: token introspection endpoint (adds a network hop per check) or validating the ID token (wrong token type for API auth). Decide token format in the auth service before building the voice validator.
